name: CSA Cloud Security Glossary
description: Cloud Security Alliance's consolidated cloud security glossary, aggregating terminology from CSA research publications (Enterprise Architecture Reference Guide, SDP, Zero Trust, AI, CCM, etc.) and external authoritative sources.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct — CSA's flagship general cloud-security terminology reference.
relationToAISecurity: Includes AI-security terminology from CSA AI working-group publications.

license.redistribution: permitted within CSA-maintained datasets per CSA authority
license.derivatives: permitted within CSA-maintained datasets per CSA authority
license.notes: Source site footer reads '© 2009-2026 Cloud Security Alliance. All rights reserved.' Cloud Security Alliance is the publisher and rights-holder. Inclusion in this public dataset is authorized by CSA leadership as part of the CSA-maintained dataset-public-laws-regulations-standards repository. Downstream redistribution by third parties remains subject to CSA's standard copyright terms; consult CSA for licensing beyond use within CSA-maintained datasets.

lifecycle.notes: Rolling — CSA continuously updates the glossary as research working groups publish new terminology.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted via extract_cloud_security_glossary.py against live HTML at cloudsecurityalliance.org. Page is static HTML, no JS required; 1,119 terms parsed.

extraction_history.reason: Initial metadata stub created from glossary research sweep
CSA leadership authorized inclusion; full extraction via requests+bs4

notes: Inclusion authorized by CSA as publisher and rights-holder (May 2026). Earlier sweep classified this as license-restricted under default copyright terms; that classification was reversed by explicit CSA authorization. Future maintainers: when refreshing, run extract_cloud_security_glossary.py --refresh to re-fetch the live page.
